title: Replace placeholder validation commands with the repository's real acceptance gates
acceptance: Configure lint, typecheck, test, build, and other blocking checks in .agent-loop/config.json
Document why each command is required for a publishable version
notes: This must be completed before the first real autonomous iteration.

title: Fill PLANS.md with the product outcome, constraints, and current repo state
acceptance: PLANS.md states the current target and non-negotiable constraints
PLANS.md lists current risks and decision log entries
notes: Autonomous loops drift quickly without a durable top-level plan.

title: Ship the first small, validated version using the autonomous loop
acceptance: A report is written to docs/reports/
The iteration is committed and published according to config
notes: Keep the first version deliberately small so the loop calibrates safely.
